mapper.select: select id, article_id, user_id, content, root_id, parent_id, reply_to_user_id, like_count, reply_count, status, create_time from comment where article_id=#{articleId} and root_id is null and status!='HIDDEN' and (#{lastCreatedAt} is null or create_time < #{lastCreatedAt} or (create_time=#{lastCreatedAt} and id < #{lastId})) order by create_time desc , id desc limit #{size}
